basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Institute Research Fellow posts! Published on 16 May 2026 at BITS Pilani Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers opening for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing Graduate/Post Graduate qualifications including M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E. in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% marks can apply online till 05 June 2026. Find all details about the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow new vacancy 2026, including eligibility

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate (M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E.) in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% Marks.
qualification.details: Graduate/Post Graduate (M.Tech/M.E./B.Tech/B.E.) in Chemical/Mechanical/Aerospace/Energy Engineering and allied streams with minimum 60% Marks.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
